messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0087",
  "title": "03二次元移动游戏市场发展趋势",
  "page_index": 33,
  "page_range": "33-34"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0088",
    "title": "AI参与的多线程叙事是趋势还是陷阱？",
    "page_range": "34-35",
    "summary": "**Topics:** AI integration in ACG (二次元) game narratives, multi-threaded storytelling, narrative control vs. interactive freedom, AI NPC implementation strategies, commercial risks of AI in character-driven monetization.\n**Entities:** 《逆水寒》手游 (Justice Mobile), 《Whispers from the star》, 蔡浩宇 (Cai Haoyu, miHoYo founder), 《和平精英》 (Game for Peace), AI队友“吉莉” (AI teammate Jili), 点点数据 (DianDian Data).\n**Dates:** Copyright 2025; references to current industry status and \"recent years\" (no specific release or implementation dates provided).\n**Definitions:** OOC (Out of Character/人设崩塌 - breakdown of established character persona); “人设防火墙” (persona firewall - technical/logical constraints ensuring AI outputs strictly align with core character traits); “有限自由” (limited freedom - strategic approach restricting AI to non-mainline, supplementary interactions).\n**Procedures:** Deploy AI dialogue outside core storylines as daily companion features; implement persona firewalls to filter and constrain AI responses; maintain narrative authority by separating AI interactions from main plot progression.\n**Claims:** AI dialogue enhances emotional companionship and immersion but creates a fundamental conflict between narrative control and interactive freedom. Unrestricted AI risks OOC behavior, which dilutes character appeal, undermines official narrative authority, and reduces player spending motivation. Current market implementations treat AI NPCs primarily as entertainment features rather than core narrative drivers. A viable commercial strategy requires balancing technical experimentation with strict persona constraints.\n**Tables/Figures:** Includes a chart/figure sourced from DianDian Data’s independent research and visualization.\n**Metrics:** 《Whispers from the star》 PC version price: ¥33.9..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0089",
    "title": "商业模式的多元化探索",
    "page_range": "35-36",
    "summary": "**可回答的检索问题与核心信息摘要：**\n- **主题/Topics：** 二次元移动游戏商业模式多元化探索；变现路径与玩家价值感受重塑；抽卡付费模式的困境与迭代；从“深度付费”向“广度付费”的行业转型趋势。\n- **实体/Entities：** 游戏产品：《伊瑟》《二重螺旋》；研究/发布机构：点点数据（DianDian Data）。\n- **日期/Dates：** 2025年（文档版权/数据研究年份）。\n- **定义与概念/Definitions：** “深度付费”（通过拆分角色机制/命座/碎片深度挖掘重氪玩家价值）；“广度付费”（降低核心内容付费门槛，注重玩家基数规模与长期生态健康）；“小保底歪池”（抽卡保底机制中的概率偏移设定）；“卖角色”到“卖体验”（商业化重心从角色强度获取转向整体游玩体验与外观消费）。\n- **流程与机制/Procedures：** 抽卡商业化改革路径：1）机制微调（重复抽取收益限定为数值成长，不解锁新机制）；2）概率优化（取消小保底歪池、提高基础概率）；3）模式重构（取消角色与武器抽卡，核心内容通过玩法/活动免费产出，付费点完全转移至不影响强度的外观/皮肤）。\n- **核心主张/Claims：** 传统抽卡模式面临两大困境：机制商品化损害普通玩家体验，随机性透支引发玩家焦虑疲惫；行业正从榨取单客价值转向注重基数与生态的“广度付费”；新模式商业成效尚待验证，但转向“卖体验”是二次元游戏红海竞争中寻求差异化与可持续发展的必然路径。\n- **图表/Tables & Figures：** 包含可视化图表“部分二次元移动游戏商业化迭代展示”，具体对比《伊瑟》（初始完全体，重复碎片仅提升数值）与《二重螺旋》（角色/武器免费获取，付费集中于皮肤外观）的机制设计差异。\n- **指标与证据类型/Metrics & Evidence：** 无具体量化数据指标；证据类型为定性行业趋势分析、典型产品案例对比、机制设计逻辑推演；数据来源标注为“点点数据自主研究及绘制”。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0090",
    "title": "“类模拟经营”元素进一步深化核心玩法循环中",
    "page_range": "36-37",
    "summary": "**Topics:** Evolution of simulation/management mechanics in anime-style mobile games; transition from decorative home systems to core gameplay loops; integration of resource management with character progression and combat; balancing heavy simulation with traditional low-burden player expectations; future competitive differentiation in the genre.\n**Entities:** Games: 《蓝色星原：旅遥》, 《明日方舟：终末地》, 《望月》, 《明日方舟》(Base System), 《原神》(Serenitea Pot), 《重返未来1999》(Home System). Developers: 蛮湫网络, 鹰角网络, 诗悦网络. Research Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data).\n**Dates:** 2026–2027 (projected launch window for upcoming titles emphasizing simulation features); 2025 (report copyright year).\n**Definitions:** \"Home systems\" (家园系统) in past titles: low-pressure, static, narrative/progression extensions focused on \"decorative companionship.\" \"Simulation/management\" (类模拟经营) in current titles: heavy gameplay involving construction, farming, and automated production that drives systemic resource loops and daily engagement.\n**Procedures:** None explicitly detailed.\n**Claims:** Simulation elements are evolving into a key competitive dimension. Three primary drivers: (1) providing long-term content to mitigate post-update gameplay droughts, (2) creating organic resource loops tied to progression/combat, and (3) increasing player agency and immersion. Heavy simulation may conflict with traditional players' preference for low-burden experiences; success requires deep integration with character narrative. Successful integration could establish a sustainable competitive moat.\n**Tables/Figures:** Includes a comparative display titled \"部分新老二次元移动游戏“类模拟经营”要素展示\" (Simulation Elements in Select New/Legacy Anime Mobile Games), sourced from DianDian Data's independent research.\n**Metrics:** None provided.\n**Evidence Types:** I..."
  }
]

message.content:
**Section:** 03二次元移动游戏市场发展趋势 (Pages 33-34)
**Topics:** AI-driven multi-threaded narrative integration, business model diversification (gacha iteration & monetization paradigm shift), and the evolution of simulation/management mechanics into core gameplay loops in anime-style (二次元) mobile games.
**Entities:** Games/Products: 《逆水寒》手游, 《Whispers from the star》, 《和平精英》, 《伊瑟》, 《二重螺旋》, 《蓝色星原：旅遥》, 《明日方舟：终末地》, 《望月》, 《明日方舟》, 《原神》, 《重返未来1999》. Key Figures/Developers: 蔡浩宇 (miHoYo founder), 蛮湫网络, 鹰角网络, 诗悦网络. AI Feature: AI队友“吉莉”. Data/Research Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data).
**Dates:** 2025 (Report copyright & research year); 2026–2027 (Projected launch window for upcoming simulation-heavy titles).
**Definitions:** OOC/人设崩塌 (character persona breakdown); “人设防火墙” (technical/logical constraints ensuring AI outputs align with core traits); “有限自由” (strategic restriction of AI to non-mainline, supplementary interactions); “深度付费” (monetizing heavy character mechanics/fragments to extract high ARPU); “广度付费” (lowering core paywalls to prioritize player base scale & ecosystem health); “小保底歪池” (gacha probability offset mechanism); “类模拟经营” (heavy construction/farming/automated production loops vs. past low-pressure decorative "home systems").
**Procedures/Strategies:** Deploy AI dialogue as daily companion features outside core storylines; implement persona firewalls to filter/constrain AI responses; maintain narrative authority by separating AI from main plot progression. Gacha reform paths: 1) limit duplicate rewards to numerical growth only, 2) optimize probabilities (remove pity offsets, raise base rates), 3) restructure monetization (make core characters/weapons free via gameplay, shift revenue entirely to non-stat cosmetics). Integrate simulation resource loops directly with character progression and combat systems.
**Claims:** AI enhances emotional companionship but creates a fundamental conflict between narrative control and interactive freedom; unrestricted AI risks OOC behavior, diluting character appeal, undermining official narrative authority, and reducing spending motivation, making constrained "limited freedom" commercially necessary. Traditional gacha models cause player fatigue and anxiety, driving an industry pivot from "selling characters" to "selling experiences" and broad-payment ecosystems. Heavy simulation mechanics offer long-term content retention and competitive moats but risk conflicting with traditional low-burden player expectations; success requires deep narrative integration.
**Tables & Figures:** DianDian Data independent research visualizations: AI/NPC market implementation chart; “部分二次元移动游戏商业化迭代展示” (comparing 《伊瑟》 & 《二重螺旋》 monetization designs); “部分新老二次元移动游戏“类模拟经营”要素展示” (comparing legacy decorative systems vs. new heavy simulation loops).
**Metrics & Evidence Types:** 《Whispers from the star》 PC version price: ¥33.9. Evidence relies on qualitative industry trend analysis, comparative product case studies, mechanism design logic deduction, and independent research/visualization by DianDian Data. No extensive quantitative financial or user-acquisition metrics are provided.

2.  **Deconstruct Child Summaries & Extract Key Elements:**

        - Entities: 《逆水寒》手游, 《Whispers from the star》, 蔡浩宇, 《和平精英》, AI队友“吉莉”, 点点数据.
        - Dates: Copyright 2025; "recent years".
        - Definitions: OOC (人设崩塌), “人设防火墙” (persona firewall), “有限自由” (limited freedom).
        - Procedures: Deploy AI outside core storylines, implement persona firewalls, separate AI from main plot.
        - Claims: AI enhances immersion but risks OOC & narrative dilution; current AI NPCs are entertainment features, not core drivers; commercial viability requires strict persona constraints.
        - Tables/Figures: Chart/figure from DianDian Data.
        - Metrics: 《Whispers from the star》 PC price: ¥33.9...
    - *Child 0089 (Business Models):*
        - Topics: Diversification of monetization, shift from "deep" to "broad" payment, gacha model困境/iteration.
        - Entities: 《伊瑟》, 《二重螺旋》, 点点数据.
        - Dates: 2025.
        - Definitions: “深度付费” (deep payment), “广度付费” (broad payment), “小保底歪池” (pity rate offset), “卖角色”到“卖体验” (selling characters to selling experiences).
        - Procedures: Gacha reform paths: 1) limit duplicate rewards to stats, 2) optimize probabilities (remove offset, raise base rate), 3) restructure model (free core content, pay for cosmetics).
        - Claims: Traditional gacha harms experience & causes fatigue; industry shifting to broad payment/ecosystem health; "selling experience" is necessary for differentiation/sustainability.
        - Tables/Figures: “部分二次元移动游戏商业化迭代展示” comparing 《伊瑟》 & 《二重螺旋》.
        - Metrics/Evidence: Qualitative trend analysis, case comparison, logic deduction; source: DianDian Data.
    - *Child 0090 (Simulation/Management Gameplay):*
        - Topics: Evolution of simulation/management mechanics, transition from decorative home systems to core loops, integration with progression/combat, balancing heavy simulation with low-burden expectations.
        - Entities: 《蓝色星原：旅遥》, 《明日方舟：终末地》, 《望月》, 《明日方舟》, 《原神》, 《重返未来1999》; Developers: 蛮湫网络, 鹰角网络, 诗悦网络; Source: 点点数据.
        - Dates: 2026–2027 (projected launch), 2025 (copyright).
        - Definitions: Past "home systems" (decorative, low-pressure) vs. current "simulation/management" (heavy gameplay, resource loops, daily engagement).
        - Claims: Simulation is a key competitive dimension for long-term content, resource loops, and immersion; risks conflict with low-burden preferences; success requires narrative integration & establishes competitive moat.
        - Tables/Figures: “部分新老二次元移动游戏“类模拟经营”要素展示”.
        - Metrics/Evidence: Qualitative analysis, comparative display; source: DianDian Data.

3.  **Synthesize into Parent Summary (Retrieval-Oriented):**
    - *Structure:* I'll organize it logically by the three main trends covered, explicitly tagging the required elements (Topics, Entities, Dates, Definitions, Procedures, Claims, Tables/Figures, Metrics, Evidence) as requested, while keeping it concise and retrieval-friendly.
    - *Draft Construction:*
      **Parent Section:** 03二次元移动游戏市场发展趋势 (Pages 33-34)
      **Overview:** This section analyzes three core development trends in the anime-style (二次元) mobile game market: AI-driven narrative integration, business model diversification, and the deepening of simulation/management gameplay loops.
      **Topics & Trends:**
      1. *AI Narrative Integration:* Explores multi-threaded storytelling, AI NPC implementation, and the tension between narrative control and interactive freedom.
      2. *Business Model Evolution:* Examines the industry shift from "deep payment" (gacha/character monetization) to "broad payment" (ecosystem/cosmetic monetization) and gacha mechanism reforms.
      3. *Simulation/Management Gameplay:* Details the transition from decorative "home systems" to core resource-management loops integrated with character progression and combat.
      **Key Entities:** Games/Products: 《逆水寒》手游, 《Whispers from the star》, 《和平精英》, 《伊瑟》, 《二重螺旋》, 《蓝色星原：旅遥》, 《明日方舟：终末地》, 《望月》, 《明日方舟》, 《原神》, 《重返未来1999》. Figures/Developers: 蔡浩宇 (miHoYo), 蛮湫网络, 鹰角网络, 诗悦网络. Data Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data).
      **Dates:** Copyright/Research Year: 2025. Projected Launch Window for simulation-heavy titles: 2026–2027.
      **Definitions:** OOC/人设崩塌 (character persona breakdown); “人设防火墙” (persona firewall for AI constraint); “有限自由” (limited AI interaction scope); “深度付费” vs. “广度付费” (monetization depth vs. breadth); “小保底歪池” (gacha probability offset); “类模拟经营” (heavy simulation/resource loops vs. past decorative home systems).
      **Procedures/Strategies:** AI deployment outside core storylines with strict persona firewalls; Gacha reform paths (limiting duplicate rewards to stats, optimizing base probabilities/removing offsets, shifting monetization to cosmetics while making core content free); Integrating simulation mechanics with daily engagement and combat progression.
      **Core Claims:** Unrestricted AI risks OOC behavior and undermines narrative authority/commercial viability, necessitating constrained "limited freedom" implementations. Traditional gacha models cause player fatigue, driving a necessary industry pivot toward "selling experiences" and broad-payment ecosystems. Heavy simulation mechanics offer a competitive moat for long-term retention but must balance with low-burden player expectations and narrative integration to succeed.
      **Tables & Figures:** DianDian Data visualizations including: AI/NPC market chart; “部分二次元移动游戏商业化迭代展示” (comparing 《伊瑟》 and 《二重螺旋》 monetization); “部分新老二次元移动游戏“类模拟经营”要素展示” (comparing legacy vs. new simulation features).
      **Metrics & Evidence Types:** 《Whispers from the star》 PC price: ¥33.9. Evidence relies on qualitative industry trend analysis, comparative product case studies, mechanism design logic deduction, and independent research/visualization by DianDian Data. No extensive quantitative financial metrics are provided.

4.  **Refine & Check Constraints:**
    - *Retrieval-oriented?* Yes, structured with clear headings/tags for quick scanning and keyword matching.
    - *Mention topics, entities, dates, tables, figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, evidence types?* All explicitly covered.

        - Child 0089: Business models, deep vs broad payment, gacha reform, 《伊瑟》, 《二重螺旋》, 2025, 点点数据, comparison chart.
        - Child 0090: Simulation/management, home systems vs heavy loops, 《蓝色星原》, 《终末地》, 《望月》, 鹰角/蛮湫/诗悦, 2025/2026-2027, 点点数据, comparison chart.
        - All aligns perfectly. I will format it cleanly.

response_text:
**Section:** 03二次元移动游戏市场发展趋势 (Pages 33-34)
**Topics:** AI-driven multi-threaded narrative integration, business model diversification (gacha iteration & monetization paradigm shift), and the evolution of simulation/management mechanics into core gameplay loops in anime-style (二次元) mobile games.
**Entities:** Games/Products: 《逆水寒》手游, 《Whispers from the star》, 《和平精英》, 《伊瑟》, 《二重螺旋》, 《蓝色星原：旅遥》, 《明日方舟：终末地》, 《望月》, 《明日方舟》, 《原神》, 《重返未来1999》. Key Figures/Developers: 蔡浩宇 (miHoYo founder), 蛮湫网络, 鹰角网络, 诗悦网络. AI Feature: AI队友“吉莉”. Data/Research Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data).
**Dates:** 2025 (Report copyright & research year); 2026–2027 (Projected launch window for upcoming simulation-heavy titles).
**Definitions:** OOC/人设崩塌 (character persona breakdown); “人设防火墙” (technical/logical constraints ensuring AI outputs align with core traits); “有限自由” (strategic restriction of AI to non-mainline, supplementary interactions); “深度付费” (monetizing heavy character mechanics/fragments to extract high ARPU); “广度付费” (lowering core paywalls to prioritize player base scale & ecosystem health); “小保底歪池” (gacha probability offset mechanism); “类模拟经营” (heavy construction/farming/automated production loops vs. past low-pressure decorative "home systems").
**Procedures/Strategies:** Deploy AI dialogue as daily companion features outside core storylines; implement persona firewalls to filter/constrain AI responses; maintain narrative authority by separating AI from main plot progression. Gacha reform paths: 1) limit duplicate rewards to numerical growth only, 2) optimize probabilities (remove pity offsets, raise base rates), 3) restructure monetization (make core characters/weapons free via gameplay, shift revenue entirely to non-stat cosmetics). Integrate simulation resource loops directly with character progression and combat systems.
**Claims:** AI enhances emotional companionship but creates a fundamental conflict between narrative control and interactive freedom; unrestricted AI risks OOC behavior, diluting character appeal, undermining official narrative authority, and reducing spending motivation, making constrained "limited freedom" commercially necessary. Traditional gacha models cause player fatigue and anxiety, driving an industry pivot from "selling characters" to "selling experiences" and broad-payment ecosystems. Heavy simulation mechanics offer long-term content retention and competitive moats but risk conflicting with traditional low-burden player expectations; success requires deep narrative integration.
**Tables & Figures:** DianDian Data independent research visualizations: AI/NPC market implementation chart; “部分二次元移动游戏商业化迭代展示” (comparing 《伊瑟》 & 《二重螺旋》 monetization designs); “部分新老二次元移动游戏“类模拟经营”要素展示” (comparing legacy decorative systems vs. new heavy simulation loops).
**Metrics & Evidence Types:** 《Whispers from the star》 PC version price: ¥33.9. Evidence relies on qualitative industry trend analysis, comparative product case studies, mechanism design logic deduction, and independent research/visualization by DianDian Data. No extensive quantitative financial or user-acquisition metrics are provided.
